# markdownviewer.run

> A free online Markdown viewer with live preview for README files, GitHub Flavored Markdown, Mermaid diagrams, KaTeX math, code blocks, pasted Markdown, local files, and raw URLs.

## About

markdownviewer.run helps developers, writers, students, and AI-tool users turn raw Markdown into a clean reading surface. It works as an online Markdown viewer, Markdown previewer, README viewer, and technical documentation preview workspace.

The product is designed for fast review of project notes, README.md files, API docs, changelogs, blog drafts, Mermaid diagrams, math-heavy notes, and Markdown output from ChatGPT, Claude, Cursor, Copilot, and coding agents.

## Features

- **Online Markdown viewer** - Paste Markdown or open a workspace for live preview.
- **GitHub Flavored Markdown** - Preview tables, task lists, links, code fences, and README-style content.
- **Mermaid diagrams** - Render flowcharts and technical diagrams from Markdown code fences.
- **KaTeX math** - Preview inline and display math notation.
- **Code highlighting** - Read syntax-highlighted code blocks inside Markdown documents.
- **Multiple sources** - Open local files, pasted Markdown, GitHub content, Gists, and raw URLs.
- **AI Markdown reader** - Review Markdown generated by ChatGPT, Claude, Cursor, Copilot, and other AI tools.

## Rating

- **Category**: DeveloperApplication, Utility, Online Markdown Viewer
- **Pricing**: Free

## Pages

| Page | Description |
|------|-------------|
| `/` | Main landing page for the online Markdown viewer and live preview workspace. |
| `/workspace` | Interactive Markdown viewer workspace for file, paste, GitHub, Gist, and raw URL preview. |

## Use Cases

- Preview README.md before publishing to GitHub.
- Render GitHub Flavored Markdown online.
- Read Markdown from ChatGPT, Claude, Cursor, or Copilot.
- Check Mermaid diagrams and KaTeX math in Markdown.
- Open local .md files in a browser-based Markdown preview.
- Review API docs, changelogs, specs, lecture notes, and blog drafts.

## Target Keywords

markdown viewer, markdown viewer online, online markdown viewer, markdown preview, markdown previewer, Markdown live preview, GitHub Flavored Markdown viewer, README viewer, Mermaid markdown viewer, Markdown viewer with math, AI Markdown viewer, ChatGPT Markdown viewer, Claude Markdown viewer, raw Markdown viewer, markdown file viewer online

## Technology

Next.js, React, TypeScript, react-markdown, remark-gfm, rehype-katex, KaTeX, Mermaid, Prism.js.
